lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak ihu sanjam prabh kirapaa paaeeai |10|
lines.english: O Nanak, this way of life is obtained by God's Grace. ||10||
With your hands and feet, work for the Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਏਕੁ ਬਖਾਨੀਐ ਬਿਰਲਾ ਜਾਣੈ ਸ੍ਵਾਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: eko ek bakhaaneeai biralaa jaanai svaad |
lines.english: Describe the Lord as the One, the One and Only. How rare are those who know the taste of this essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਨ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਭੁ ਬਿਸਮਾਦੁ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: gun gobind na jaaneeai naanak sabh bisamaad |11|
lines.english: The Glories of the Lord of the Universe cannot be known. O Nanak, He is totally amazing and wonderful! ||11||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇੰਦ੍ਰੀ ਬਸਿ ਕਰਿ ਸੁਣਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: eindree bas kar sunahu har naam |
lines.english: Subdue the desires of your sexual organs, and listen to the Lord's Name.
Pauree:
The eleventh day of the lunar cycle: Behold the Lord, the Lord, near at hand.
Let your mind be content, and be kind to all beings.
In this way, your fast will be successful.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸੁਧੁ ਜਪਤ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan sudh japat har naae |
lines.english: Your mind and body shall become pure, chanting the Lord's Name.
Keep your wandering mind restrained in one place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਅਟਲ ਏਹੁ ਧਰਮ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak har keeratan kar attal ehu dharam |11|
lines.english: O Nanak, sing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises; this alone is the eternal faith of Dharma. ||11||
The Supreme Lord God is pervading amongst all.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਿਉ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੇ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਸਗਲ ਜੰਜਾਲ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh siau mil rahe binase sagal janjaal |12|
lines.english: Nanak is merged with God; all his entanglements have come to an end. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਕਰੀ ਭੇਟੇ ਸਾਧ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: duramat haree sevaa karee bhette saadh kripaal |
lines.english: Evil-mindedness is eliminated, by meeting with and serving the compassionate Holy Saints.
Pauree:
The twelfth day of the lunar cycle: Dedicate yourself to giving charity, chanting the Naam and purification.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਤਜਿ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: har kee bhagat karahu taj maan |
lines.english: Worship the Lord with devotion, and get rid of your pride.
Drink in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Lord's Name, in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
The mind is satisfied by lovingly singing the Kirtan of God's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਭੂ ਆਤਮਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਰਸਿ ਪੋਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: panch bhoo aatamaa har naam ras pokhai |
lines.english: The soul, the subtle essence of the five elements, cherishes the Nectar of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
The Sweet Words of His Bani soothe everyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਰਮਤ ਫਿਰਿ ਜੋਨਿ ਨ ਆਈਐ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naanak raam ramat fir jon na aaeeai |12|
lines.english: O Nanak, dwelling upon the Lord, you shall not enter the womb of reincarnation again. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਤੇ ਏਹ ਨਿਹਚਉ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore te eeh nihchau paaeeai |
lines.english: This faith is obtained from the Perfect Guru.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਉਧਾਰਣੁ ਮਨਿ ਬਸੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਛੂਟੈ ਨਾਮ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: patit udhaaran man basai naanak chhoottai naam |13|
lines.english: When the Saving Grace of sinners dwells in the mind, O Nanak, then one is saved by the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਨਿ ਗੁਣਾ ਮਹਿ ਬਿਆਪਿਆ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਤ ਨ ਕਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: teen gunaa meh biaapiaa pooran hot na kaam |
lines.english: Engrossed in the three qualities, one's efforts do not succeed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਜਨੁ ਨ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਆਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: har har bhajan na man meh aaeo |
lines.english: Meditation on the Lord, Har, Har, does not enter into the minds of the people.
Pauree:
The thirteenth day of the lunar cycle: The world is in the fever of the three qualities.
It comes and goes, and is reincarnated in hell.
It suffers from the chronic and incurable disease of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਖ ਸੋਗ ਕਾ ਦੇਹ ਕਰਿ ਬਾਧਿਓ ॥
lines.translit: harakh sog kaa deh kar baadhio |
lines.english: This body is the embodiment of pleasure and pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਸਾਗਰ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਿਮਖ ਨ ਗਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: sukh saagar prabh nimakh na gaaeo |
lines.english: They do not sing the Praises of God, the Ocean of peace, even for an instant.
And then with sleep in their eyes, they mutter in dreams.
Forgetting the Lord, this is their condition.
By day, people practice corruption, wearing themselves out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਕੁੰਟ ਚਉਦਹ ਭਵਨ ਸਗਲ ਬਿਆਪਤ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: chaar kuntt chaudah bhavan sagal biaapat raam |
lines.english: The Lord is pervading in all the four directions and the fourteen worlds.
Salok:
Nanak seeks the Sanctuary of God, the kind and compassionate Primal Being. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਊਨ ਨ ਦੇਖੀਐ ਪੂਰਨ ਤਾ ਕੇ ਕਾਮ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak aoon na dekheeai pooran taa ke kaam |14|
lines.english: O Nanak, He is not seen to be lacking anything; His works are perfectly complete. ||14||
Pauree:
The fourteenth day of the lunar cycle: God Himself is in all four directions.
On all worlds, His radiant glory is perfect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਨਿ ਅਕਾਸ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: dharan akaas sabh meh prabh pekh |
lines.english: Behold God in all the earth and sky.
The One God is diffused in the ten directions.
In the water, on the land, in the forests and mountains, and in the nether regions of the underworld,
the Merciful Transcendent Lord is abiding.
The Lord God is in all mind and matter, subtle and manifest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮੁ ਜੀਤਾ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: aatam jeetaa guramatee gun gaae gobind |
lines.english: The soul is conquered, through the Guru's Teachings, singing the Glories of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦੀ ਭੈ ਮਿਟੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਬਿਨਸੀ ਚਿੰਦ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: sant prasaadee bhai mitte naanak binasee chind |15|
lines.english: By the Grace of the Saints, fear is dispelled, O Nanak, and anxiety is ended. ||15||
Salok:
O Nanak, the Gurmukh realizes God. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਮਾਵਸ ਆਤਮ ਸੁਖੀ ਭਏ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਦੀਆ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: amaavas aatam sukhee bhe santokh deea guradev |
lines.english: The day of the new moon: My soul is at peace; the Divine Guru has blessed me with contentment.
Pauree:
